official_functions.role: Provide the official registry key used by the minimal registry_data packet fixture
Construct the official Configuration clientbound registry_data packet fixture
Write and read the official Configuration clientbound registry_data body
Write the full Configuration clientbound framed registry_data packet
Dispatch and decode the full Configuration clientbound framed registry_data packet
Name the packet id assigned in Configuration clientbound state
Read the decoded registry key and entry count from the official packet instance

invariants: The official Configuration clientbound protocol codec writes the packet table id before the registry_data body.
The official ClientboundRegistryDataPacket.STREAM_CODEC writes the registry ResourceKey and the entry list.
The official Configuration clientbound protocol codec dispatches the framed packet id to ClientboundRegistryDataPacket.
The decoded official ClientboundRegistryDataPacket preserves the DIMENSION_TYPE registry key and the empty entry list for this packet-support fixture.
The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, registry key, entry count, and remaining decode byte count are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.

This contract does not prove real registry contents, RegistrySynchronization.packRegistries output, registry hydration, Configuration completion, Play entry, world load, render readiness, or runtime behavior.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer real registry contents, RegistrySynchronization.packRegistries output, registry hydration, Configuration-to-Play readiness, Play readiness, or runtime behavior.
